summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of user-requested changes: (1) Food trucks page consolidation - redirect working correctly, (2) AI-Powered Automation section positioning on 7 POS pages - all correctly placed after 'Why Choose' sections, (3) MSC logo visible at bottom of AI sections, (4) AI FAQ questions present on all required pages. All 10 test cases passed.

passed: 2. Navigation menu has only ONE food truck link pointing to /food-trucks-pos (not two links)
